## 📋 Pull Request Description

### 🎯 Changes Made
Briefly describe what this PR changes and why it's needed.

### 🔗 Related Issue
Closes # (issue number)

## ✅ Checklist

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] All tests pass (`python -m pytest -v`)
- [ ] New functionality has tests added
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] Tested with multiple Ollama models (if applicable)

### 📚 Documentation
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with relevant changes
- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] CONTEXT.md updated (if internal changes)
- [ ] Docstrings added to new functions
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic

### 🔍 Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows existing style patterns
- [ ] Type hints are used consistently
- [ ] No TODO comments left in final code
- [ ] No debug prints or console.log statements
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate

### 🚀 Performance & Security
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Dependencies are up to date (if changed)
- [ ] Cache behavior is appropriate (if modified)

### 🌐 Multi-language Support
- [ ] TypeScript validation works (if relevant)
- [ ] Go validation works (if relevant)
- [ ] Other language validations work (if relevant)

## 📝 Merge Requirements

Before merging, ensure:

- [ ] All checklist items are completed
